name: Better Than Sex Cake #2
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the cake mixture according to the package directions. Pour the mixture into a 13x9 inch pan.
2. Preheat the oven as specified in the package directions and bake until the cake is done.
3. Remove the cake from the oven and let it cool completely on a wire rack.
4. In a saucepan, combine the undrained pineapple (with juice) and sugar. Heat over medium heat until the mixture comes to a boil.
5. Continue boiling for about 2 minutes, then remove from heat.
6. Spread the hot pineapple mixture evenly over the cooled cake.
7. Prepare the vanilla pudding according to the package directions. Fold in the sour cream until well combined.
8. Spread the pudding mixture over the top of the cake.
9. Top with Cool Whip and sprinkle with coconut shavings and chopped nuts, if desired.
10. Refrigerate the cake until serving.
